title: AP Capital City Works — Key Personnel Deployment Requirements
text_english: The Contractor SHALL DEPLOY at the project site, throughout the contract period, the following KEY PERSONNEL with the qualifications and minimum experience as specified: (a) {{chief_pm_count}} (default 1) CHIEF PROJECT MANAGER — Graduate in Civil Engineering with {{chief_pm_years}} (default 20) years of experience in executing similar works (also designated as GRIEVANCE REDRESSAL EXPERT); (b) {{electrical_mgr_count}} (default 1) ELECTRICAL/MECHANICAL MANAGER — Post Graduate in Electrical/Mechanical Engineering with {{electrical_mgr_years}} (default 15) years of experience in MEP works; (c) {{construction_mgr_count}} (default 1) CONSTRUCTION MANAGER — Graduate in Civil Engineering with {{construction_mgr_years}} (default 15) years of experience in similar works; (d) {{civil_engr_count}} (default 4) CIVIL SITE ENGINEERS — Graduate in Civil Engineering with {{civil_engr_years}} (default 10) years of experience; (e) Quality Engineer(s) — Graduate in Civil Engineering with relevant experience. The Bidder SHALL submit PROOF of availability of adequate design and execution engineers, AND SHALL submit a PROPOSED ORGANIZATION CHART along with STAFF DEPLOYMENT SCHEDULE along with the tender.
